name: S8 v2: UGC Ingest (Drive → VPS, multi-brand prefix routing + Quarantine)

nodes.name: Download UGC Folder Files
nodes.notes: Drive folder used as the unified UGC drop folder. Currently the existing nordpilates folder ID; operator may rename or repoint at import time.

nodes.name: Skip Filter
nodes.notes: True branch (output 0) → file skipped; routes to Quarantine + Log. False branch (output 1) → normal ingest path.

nodes.name: Log Quarantine
nodes.notes: Operator must create the 'Ingestion Log' tab in the Video Pipeline sheet before activating this workflow. Columns: Timestamp, Filename, Reason, Drive File ID.

nodes.name: Send to VPS
nodes.notes: Timeout 30 min — pre-normalize + Gemini Pro segment analysis on long parents can take 15+ min.

nodes.name: Move to Processed
nodes.notes: Existing Processed folder. Multi-brand inheritance — operator may rename to a unified label after this v2 ships.
